scripts.build: node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js mkdir -p ./dist ./dist/js ./dist/data && node ./node_modules/tailwindcss/lib/cli.js -i ./src/styles/main.css -o ./styles.css --minify && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./styles.css ./dist/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp J1U_CMF_Dashboard.html ./dist/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp J1U_CMF_Editor.html ./dist/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./src/js/dashboard.js ./dist/js/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./src/data/DEFAULT_DATA.json ./dist/data/
scripts.build:css: node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js mkdir -p ./dist ./dist/js ./dist/data && node ./node_modules/tailwindcss/lib/cli.js -i ./src/styles/main.css -o ./styles.css && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./styles.css ./dist/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./src/js/dashboard.js ./dist/js/ && node ./node_modules/shx/lib/cli.js cp ./src/data/DEFAULT_DATA.json ./dist/data/
